With Random Creams?

Specialist Medical Care | Skin, Hair & Nail Disorders | Clinical Excellence

The Challenge

Common Skin Conditions Need Medical Diagnosis, Not Just Skincare

If you are struggling with itching, rashes, scaling, white patches, or chronic skin infections, you might have tried many over-the-counter creams that provide only temporary relief.

Diseases like psoriasis, vitiligo, and chronic eczema require a proper medical diagnosis and a long-term control plan. Without correct treatment, these conditions can spread, become chronic, or lead to permanent scarring and pigmentation.

Treating the symptoms isn't enough—we focus on addressing the root cause with evidence-based medical dermatology.

Clinical Expertise

Dermatologist Care for Skin, Hair, and Nail Disorders

At Dr. Alam’s Skin Clinic, we manage a wide range of medical skin conditions. Whether it's a pediatric skin rash or a chronic autoimmune disorder, our goal is to improve your quality of life through structured care.

We provide you with clear education on your condition and a treatment plan that covers medical therapy, lifestyle adjustments, and necessary clinical procedures.

"We focus on long-term disease control and preventing recurrences, so you can feel comfortable in your own skin again."

The Medical Path

Your Recovery in 3 Steps

01

Diagnosis

A thorough clinical examination of your skin, hair, or nail problem to identify the exact condition.

02

Treatment Plan

We start your evidence-based medical therapy and personalized skincare protocol immediately.

03

Monitoring

Regular follow-ups to monitor your progress, adjust medication, and ensure long-term maintenance.

Full Scope

Conditions We Treat Every Day

Chronic & Immune-Related

Psoriasis & Vitiligo

Targeted medical control for scaling and white patches.

Eczema & Lichen Planus

Managing chronic inflammation and intense itching.

Autoimmune Conditions

Specialized care for complex skin disorders.

Infections & Allergies

Fungal & Bacterial

Clinical clearance of persistent skin infections.

Urticaria & Allergies

Identifying triggers and controlling chronic hives.

Warts & Herpes

Medical and procedural treatment for viral skin issues.

Hair & Scalp

Treating Alopecia Areata, severe dandruff, and infections.

Nail Disorders

Fungal nails, ingrown nails, and structural nail issues.

Pediatric Care

Gentle, expert dermatology for newborns and children.

The Outcome

Focusing on Disease Control & Quality of Life

While some chronic skin conditions require ongoing management, our goal is to bring them under complete control. With the right medical intervention and regular follow-up, your symptoms can be minimized, recurrences prevented, and your overall skin health restored.

We help you manage your skin condition, so it stops managing you.

The Risks

The Consequences of Improper Treatment

Ignoring a skin problem or using random creams can lead to serious complications:

  • The disease spreading to larger areas of your body
  • Development of chronic, irreversible skin thickening
  • Permanent dark spots or scarring
  • Secondary infections that require aggressive therapy

Medical Advice:

If your skin condition has lasted more than 3 weeks or keeps returning after using over-the-counter creams, you need a consultant dermatologist's diagnosis to prevent long-term damage.

Common Queries

Frequently Asked Questions

Are these skin diseases contagious? +
Fungal, bacterial, and viral infections are contagious, but chronic conditions like Psoriasis, Vitiligo, and Eczema are NOT contagious and cannot be spread to others.
Can chronic diseases like Psoriasis be cured? +
While some chronic diseases are controlled rather than permanently cured, modern medical treatments allow us to clear the skin almost completely and maintain long-term remission.
What if I have tried many creams already? +
Many generic creams contain strong steroids that hide symptoms but don't treat the cause. We identify the actual condition and start you on a targeted, safe medical plan.
